heroHeadline: Iran Strikes Kuwait Power and Water Infrastructure as Gulf Theater Expands on Day 37
heroSubtitle: Kuwait reports power and water facilities hit by Iranian strikes, marking an escalation beyond the immediate conflict theater. Thousands rally in Baghdad against US-Israeli campaign; Trump signals exit-strategy pressure from Washington.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
